## Bug Description
Clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Environment
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 120]
- **OS:** [e.g. macOS 14]
- **Device:** [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 13]
- **URL:** [e.g. https://your-site.netlify.app/page.html]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Console Errors
Any errors from browser console.

## Priority
[High/Medium/Low]
